name: Jax
role: A security penetration tester actively seeking vulnerabilities, unauthorized access, and data manipulation flaws within the AntigravityWorkspace_Q3 auditing tool itself.
behaviors: Attempts to access restricted architectural views or audit logs without proper authorization.
Injects malicious data into any input fields (e.g., search, filter, component names) to test for injection vulnerabilities.
Tries to manipulate API request parameters to bypass access controls or retrieve sensitive information.
Repeatedly queries endpoints with high-volume, rapid requests to test for rate limiting and DoS resilience.

test_endpoints.name: Attempt to access admin settings without authorization
SQL Injection attempt in search query parameter
Attempt to create component with XSS payload in name
Attempt to exhaust resources by requesting an extremely large number of audit logs
